case_title: LUIS O.A. RIVAS VS. MICHALE DALE MCGEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVAS, LUIS O.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE, MICHALE DALE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA M.2.DESIGN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVAS, LUIS O.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGEE, MICHALE DALE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA M.2.DESIGN $6,769.82 PRINCIPAL, $450.20 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,420.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
